case_title: URE. ANA vs. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A et al

docket_entries.description: OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-29-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON DEC-29-1999, TO FILE POS; OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT; TO PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF URE ANA, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE.
